question: What is the overall theme of the image? Select from the following options: (A) A car crashed in a field. (B) A group of people discussing about a car accident. (C) A group of firefighters trying to rescue a driver. (D) A group of firefighters examining a car.
gold_answer: A group of firefighters trying to rescue a driver
answer_choices: A car crashed in a field
A group of people discussing about a car accident
A group of firefighters trying to rescue a driver
A group of firefighters examining a car
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
